title: Translate adapter DTOs at the edge
scenario: Adapter DTOs should be converted into domain commands before use-case logic runs.
instructions: Define an adapters module with RegisterUserRequest and RequestError. Implement TryFrom<RegisterUserRequest> for domain::RegisterUserCommand by trimming input and rejecting empty fields.

hints.body: RegisterUserRequest can expose public String fields because it is an adapter DTO, not a domain type.
Use RegisterUserCommand::new and EmailAddress::new after trimming, and return RequestError for empty email or display name.
One complete solution for Translate adapter DTOs at the edge is shown below.

completionExplanation: RegisterUserRequest is now translated at the adapter edge into the domain command, keeping validation and DTO shape out of the use case.
